svg.title: Brand Audit AI Agent — Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Full architecture showing user input, Streamlit UI, Tavily search tool, four AI agents in sequence, Groq API, and Railway deployment wrapper.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user input into the brand audit agent?')
sendPrompt('What does the Streamlit UI do in the brand audit agent?')
sendPrompt('What does the pipeline orchestrator do?')
sendPrompt('Why is Tavily Search used in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does Agent 1 Perception Researcher do?')
sendPrompt('What does Agent 2 Sentiment Analyst do?')
sendPrompt('What does Agent 3 Audit Report Writer produce?')
sendPrompt('What does the final brand audit report contain?')
sendPrompt('Why was Groq chosen over Gemini for this project?')
